description: Variables the F1 Racing Store site provides directly to the Tealium data layer. These are NOT created by any extension — they arrive from the site's own code (gridbox_data, event pushes, utag_data on the page). The graph and AI agents must NOT flag reads of these as broken chains.

notes.gridbox_data: Set by racing-f1/analytics.js before utag.js loads
notes.tealium_event: Set by GridBox Event Bridge or site-side push; also by 02-datalayer-bridge.js
notes.eventCategory: Flat event attribute from gb_<category>_<action> GridBox events
notes.eventAction: Flat event attribute from gb_<category>_<action> GridBox events
notes.user_id: Set by site authentication layer on login; read by 02-identity-resolver.js
notes.user_email: Set by site authentication layer on login; read by 02-identity-resolver.js
notes.tier: Set by site membership API; read by 02-identity-resolver.js
notes.consent_analytics: Written by 01-consent-manager.js onto utag_data in Pre Loader
notes.consent_marketing: Written by 01-consent-manager.js onto utag_data in Pre Loader
notes.consent_status: Written by 01-consent-manager.js onto utag_data in Pre Loader
